---
title: "Salmon Data Standards Hub"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

This hub is the **starting point** for standardizing, integrating, and publishing salmon data with shared semantics.

For the branded front-door view of the full system path, start here:

- [Salmon Data Integration System — Start Here](semantic-salmon-system.qmd)

::: {.callout-note}
Current SPSR direction is **package-first**. Build one salmon data package first, then prepare the route-scoped upload that matches your data grain.
:::

## Start here (common tasks)

- **I need the full system path first** → [Salmon Data Integration System — Start Here](semantic-salmon-system.qmd)
- **I need to prepare data for an FSAR** → [FSAR Data Standardization Workflow](../../how_to_guides/fsar-data-standardization-workflow.qmd)
- **I need to submit FSAR data to SPSR** → [FSAR to SPSR: End-to-End Example](../../how_to_guides/fsar-to-spsr-end-to-end-example.qmd) and [Salmon data package + guided review + SPSR intake path](ontology-data-package-gpt.qmd)
- **I need a focused CU/composite escapement recipe** → [CU/composite escapement estimates for package-first SPSR intake](../../cookbook/cu-composite-escapement-estimates.qmd)
- **I need standard terms and definitions** → [GC DFO Salmon Ontology (WIDOCO)](https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon)
- **I need package structure/spec details** → [Salmon data package specification](salmon-data-exchange-package.qmd)
- **I need canonical markdown spec source** → <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/smn-data-pkg/blob/main/SPECIFICATION.md>
- **I need practical identifier rules** → [IRI and Identifier Policy](iri-identifier-policy.qmd)
- **I need to understand how ontology + salmon data package + tools fit together** → [Semantic Salmon Data Ecosystem](semantic-salmon-data-ecosystem.qmd)
- **I need to publish data** → [Publish Your Data](publish-data.qmd) and [Publishing Data Externally](../publishing_data_externally.qmd)
- **I need recent changes/status** → [Standards & Workflow Changelog](changelog.qmd)

## Start by role

- **Data producer (scientist/analyst)**
  - [Standardize Your Data](standardize-data.qmd)
  - [Integrate Data](integrate-data.qmd)
  - [FSAR to SPSR: End-to-End Example](../../how_to_guides/fsar-to-spsr-end-to-end-example.qmd)
  - [CU/composite escapement estimates for package-first SPSR intake](../../cookbook/cu-composite-escapement-estimates.qmd)
- **Ontology contributor**
  - [Contributor conventions](https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/CONVENTIONS.md)
  - [Formal ontology docs](https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon)
  - [Term requests](https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/SUBMIT_REQUESTS_README.md)
- **Data steward/reviewer**
  - [Salmon data package + guided review + SPSR intake path](ontology-data-package-gpt.qmd)
  - [IRI and Identifier Policy](iri-identifier-policy.qmd)
  - [Publishing Data Externally](../publishing_data_externally.qmd)

## Standards map

### 1) Controlled vocabularies and ontology
Use these to anchor variable meaning to shared definitions and stable IRIs.

- [GC DFO Salmon Ontology (WIDOCO)](https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon)
- [Contributor conventions](https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/CONVENTIONS.md)
- [Term requests](https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/SUBMIT_REQUESTS_README.md)

### 2) Package your dataset with a salmon data package
Use salmon data package metadata files to describe your dataset, tables, columns, and controlled codes.

- [Salmon data package specification](salmon-data-exchange-package.qmd)
- [IRI and Identifier Policy](iri-identifier-policy.qmd)
- [Salmon data package + guided review + SPSR intake path](ontology-data-package-gpt.qmd)

### 3) Use implementation workflows
- [Standardize Your Data](standardize-data.qmd)
- [Integrate Data](integrate-data.qmd)
- [Publish Your Data](publish-data.qmd)
- [FSAR Data Standardization Workflow](../../how_to_guides/fsar-data-standardization-workflow.qmd)
- [FSAR to SPSR: End-to-End Example](../../how_to_guides/fsar-to-spsr-end-to-end-example.qmd)
- [CU/composite escapement estimates for package-first SPSR intake](../../cookbook/cu-composite-escapement-estimates.qmd)

### 4) Track what changed
- [Standards & Workflow Changelog](changelog.qmd)

## Downloadable starter template

A minimal starter package is available here:

- [Download minimal salmon data package example (zip)](examples/sdep-minimal-example.zip)
- [Browse example files in repo](https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/data-stewardship-unit/tree/main/reference_info/data_standards/examples/sdep-minimal-example)

The starter example follows the canonical `metadata/` + `data/` layout.

## Need help?

- Open an issue: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/data-stewardship-unit/issues>
- Contact DSU: <mailto:FADSDataStewardship-GestiondesdonneesSFDA@dfo-mpo.gc.ca>
